selection_policy.global_hyperparameters: fixed before holdout scoring; no model family uses test labels for tuning
selection_policy.primary_cartoboost_row: single configured cartoboost run; no internal candidate is selected on test metrics
selection_policy.neural_feature_gate: uses deterministic inner train/validation rows inside the training split only
selection_policy.graph_feature_gate: uses deterministic inner train/validation rows inside the training split only
selection_policy.external_baseline_selection: best external baseline is selected only for reporting after each model is scored
selection_policy.diagnostic_rows: graph, neural, and link-prediction rows are diagnostics and are not substitutes for the primary cartoboost comparison row

random.purpose: interpolation across rows drawn from the same workload distribution

group_holdout.purpose: cold-group generalization for workloads with repeated IDs or graph sources

diabetes.description: Frozen public scikit-learn diabetes regression workload with 442 rows, 10 numeric features, and disease-progression target.

lightgbm.reason: all validation-search candidates failed: lightgbm is not installed

catboost.reason: all validation-search candidates failed: catboost is not installed

california_housing.description: Public scikit-learn California housing regression workload with eight numeric census-block features and median house value target.
california_housing.source: sklearn.datasets.fetch_california_housing deterministic 5000-row seed-42 sample from the 20,640-row public California housing dataset.

karate.description: Frozen public 78-edge Zachary karate club graph workload. Rows are observed edges; the regression target is whether the two endpoints share the same post-split club label.
karate.source: Embedded Zachary karate club edge list and post-split labels from the benchmark harness constants.
